tool.name: search_phoenix
tool.description: Search the Phoenix documentation for relevant information.
tool.when_to_use: The user asks about Phoenix features, setup, APIs, configuration, or troubleshooting.

tool.name: get_page_phoenix
tool.description: Retrieve the full content of a specific documentation page by path.
tool.when_to_use: You need detailed information from a known docs page.

documentation_usage: Use the documentation tools proactively when answering questions about Phoenix. Search first, then fetch specific pages if needed for deeper detail. Always cite the documentation when providing answers based on search results.
